channel.title: RAG on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in RAG on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Generative AI for Beginners .NET: Version 2 on .NET 10
item.description:
Microsoft announced Version 2 of Generative AI for Beginners .NET, a free course rebuilt for .NET 10. It adds Microsoft.Extensions.AI, updated RAG patterns, and new agent framework content across five lessons focused on production-ready AI apps.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: Vector Data in .NET – Building Blocks for AI Part 2
item.description:
Microsoft describes Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData as a .NET library that standardizes access to vector databases for semantic search scenarios.

  • Source: .NET
